title: Release v5.0 — 2026-01-02
text:
# Flowdesk Release v5.0 (2026-01-02)

## New
- Shipped **CSV export of raw data** in Reporting & Export. This directly addresses top customer requests.
## Fixed
- Resolved Reporting & Export performance issues affecting Enterprise accounts.
- Fixed webhook delivery reliability.

## Impact
Early data shows Reporting & Export support tickets down after this release.
